# hindclaw_user (Resource)

Manages a Hindclaw user.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `display_name` (String) Display name.
- `id` (String) User identifier. Immutable after creation.

### Optional

- `email` (String) Email address.
